.The fissile layer were mounted back to back with the
layer of 25 micro-g Li6F/cm2,in the center of a vacuum
chamber. The fissile layers were evaporated homoge-
neously with a thickness of 40 micro-g U233/cm2
A normalization was done in the thermal region
relative to the zero fission cross-sections values
proposed for the ENDF-B6 file for U233.
Data were taken from private communication
